titleStmt.title: SII 16.115: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 115. (A.R. No. 680 of 1917.) PERUSŌMULA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the courtyard of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷaṁbi, Āshāḍha ba. 13, corresponding to 1538 A.D., July 24, (Wednesday).

It records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Hanumayadēva-mahārāju, son of Chintakuṇṭa Siddhayadēva-mahārāju of Ātrēya-gōtra, remitted the levies in cash and kind of the mānya lands of the temples of Mahāliṅga, Chennakēśvara and Vīrayya in the uṁbaḷi village of Perusōmula, that were collected unjustly by the former rulers, and made over the proceeds of this remission to the respective temples. The donor is said to have obtained the village of Perusōmula as uṁbaḷi from Salukarāju Raghupatirājayyadēva mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
harē¨rlīlāvarāhasya daṁṣṭrādaṁḍa ssapātuvaḥ . hēmādhrikala
śāyatra . dhātrīcchatra śrīyaṁ dadhau . 2 . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1460 Agunēṭi viḷaṁ
bi(ṁ) saṁvatsara Āṣāḍa ba 13 puṇyakālamaṁdu Ātrē
ya gōtṛlaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara ciṁtakuṁṭa śiddhaya dēvama
hārājula komāruḍu hanumayadēva mahārājulu perusō
mula mahāliṁgānakunnu ceṁnnakēśvara perumāḷakunu vīrayya
kunnu daṁḍaṁ sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina dhaṁ¨rma śilāśāsanakrama
meṭlannanu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī
Acyutadēva mahārāyalu . pridhvīsāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍa
ṁgānu salukarāju raghupatirājayya dēvamahārājulu
māku vuṁbbaḷiki pāliṁci yiccina perusōmula grāmamaṁdu
yī dēvasthānālakunu cellivaccē mānyālaku kṣētraṁ yēli pō
yina rājulu Anyāyaṁcēsi koṁna rokhadhānyālu hariharādulu
Āragiṁppulaku sama¨rpistimi gāna yī kṣētrālu Aṁta
voṭṭu sa¨rvvamānyaṁgānu naḍaci rāgalavigāna yiṁdu
lku yevvaru yēmi tappu naḍacinānu kāśīlōnu mātṛpi
tṛvadhāṁnu gōbrāhmaṇavadhalu [.] sēsina pāpāna bōye
darugāka maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁjēyunu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
